calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rafael Pacquing for Xiaohua Ding (Petitioner).

The Court stated that after reviewing the evidence presented it was satisfied with the proof and granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-06-2009 Continued To Jun-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rafael Pacquing for Xiaohua Ding (Petitioner).

The Court stated that there was an issue with the translation of the documents, (death certificate and marriage certificate) and requested the documents be authenticated by a neutral party suggesting the Chinese Consulate. In addition, the Court requested copies of the closing statement for the purchase of the property and the closing statement for the sale of the property by the Decedent and the Spouse. The matter was continued to June 2, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to obtain the documents in the required format and the information on the property.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Ann Mendoza, CSR#6812. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Jackson.
